name: Black Forest Cheese Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
Black Forest Cheese Cupcakes
Preheat oven to 325°F. Line muffin pans with foil-laminated baking cups. Place a vanilla wafer on the bottom of each cup. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Add sugar, cocoa, and flour; blend well. Add eggs; beat thoroughly. Stir in sour cream and almond extract. Fill each prepared cup almost full with the mixture. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until set. Remove from oven and let cool for 5 to 10 minutes. Spread a heaping teaspoon of cocoa sour cream topping over each cup. Let cool completely in pans; then refrigerate. Garnish with a dollop of cherry pie filling just before serving. Refrigerate leftovers. Makes 18-24 cupcakes.
Cocoa Sour Cream Topping
1 cup Sour cream
¼ cup Sugar
2 tbsp Cocoa
Stir together ingredients in a small bowl until sugar is dissolved.
